source.note: Ranking and tie-breaker donor parity fixture evidence only; runtime behavior is not changed.

cases.name: deepmemo-multi-topic-order-tie-breaker-snapshot
cases.purpose: Lock cross-topic ordering where compactness and recency affect DeepMemo ranking.

orderedResultIncludes:
[回忆片段1]:
Master: Delivery schedule also needs Phase C coverage and benchmark tracking.
Keke: Benchmark review should finish before the schedule sign-off.

[回忆片段2]:
Master: We should discuss the codex-memory system plan.
Keke: Move DeepMemo first, then keep TopicMemo and Phase C recall audit aligned.

cases.name: deepmemo-single-topic-window-order-tie-breaker-snapshot
cases.purpose: Lock single-topic window order where score and window position decide ranking.

orderedResultIncludes:
[回忆片段1]:
Keke: Old checklist only mentions docs.
Architect: Phase D rollback compare migration priority should be reviewed now.
Keke: That should gate the cutover.

[回忆片段2]:
Keke: Later we can refine compare dashboards.
Architect: Phase D compare migration can resume after docs review.
Keke: Migration should wait until compare is green.

cases.name: deepmemo-three-window-order-tie-breaker-snapshot
cases.purpose: Lock three-window ordering across strongest, middle, and later checkpoint matches.

orderedResultIncludes:
[回忆片段1]:
Keke: Noted for the backlog.
Architect: Phase D rollback compare migration must be checked now.
Keke: This strongest checkpoint should gate the cutover.

[回忆片段2]:
Keke: Saved for the suite.
Architect: Phase D compare should be reviewed next.
Keke: Migration can wait until rollback is stable.

[回忆片段3]:
Keke: Later we can trim the backlog.
Architect: Compare migration can resume after docs review.
Keke: No rollback sign-off is needed for that later step.

cases.name: deepmemo-large-multi-topic-order-tie-breaker-snapshot
cases.purpose: Lock large multi-topic ordering across gamma, beta, and alpha migration checkpoints.

orderedResultIncludes:
[回忆片段1]:
Planner: Phase D compare migration should be reviewed before launch in gamma.
Keke: Gamma keeps the newest migration checkpoint.

[回忆片段2]:
Planner: Phase D compare migration needs a second beta checkpoint.
Keke: Beta should remain the middle migration signal.

[回忆片段3]:
Planner: Phase D compare migration began in the earliest alpha checkpoint.
Keke: Alpha keeps the oldest migration note.

non_goals: no import/export or migration behavior change
no real DB or memory write
